{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's scissors
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] struck at [[Lindon]] with his scissors.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan's scissors]] inflated to ten times their size and trailed gray mist.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] was spinning his black fabric scissors around his thumb.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] uses fabric scissors made of dark metal.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
